top_signals.title: Apollo Bets on Mexico With $20 Billion Target for Private Credit
top_signals.summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. plans to put as much as $20 billion to work financing projects in Mexico as the giant asset manager seeks new outlets for its private credit business.

top_signals.title: GTT receives an order from HD KSOE for the tank design of two new LNG Carriers
top_signals.summary: GTT announces that it has received, in the second quarter of 2026, an order from HD Korea Shipbuilding & Offshore Engineering (HD KSOE[1]) for the tank design of two new Liquefied Natural Gas Carriers (LNGCs). The LNGCs will be built by the shipyard HD Hyundai Heavy Industries, each with a capacity of 174,000 m³. The ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
